title: delphinium parryi subsp. parryi
intro: Delphinium parryi subsp. parryi, also known as Parry's delphinium, is a perennial plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant. The health benefits of Delphinium parryi subsp. parryi include its potential to help with respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its roots, stems, or leaves to make teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
